name: multi-turn-context
description: Test that context carries across prompts — environment setting persists, follow-up questions work

steps.name: set-context
steps.prompt: I'm working on the OSDU partition service today, the repo is cloned in the workspace

steps.name: follow-up-uses-context
steps.prompt: check if there are any open MRs for it

assertions.description: Uses prior context (partition service) for MR lookup

steps.name: domain-switch
steps.prompt: actually, can you also check the terraform plan for infra changes?
